_README: Declarative description of every situation in which a player receives an SMS. A daily pipeline evaluates scenarios against each player's computed facts, picks the matching segment, and hands that segment's intent/tone to an LLM which writes the final message. JSON has no comments, so fields prefixed with _ are documentation only and are ignored by the pipeline.

settings._quiet_hours: Never send outside this window, even if a scenario fires (clamp or skip).
settings._frequency_caps: Global guardrails so no player is over-messaged regardless of how many scenarios match. Cap is 2/day because a non-submitter can get the 9am prompt AND the 6pm nudge on the same prompt day.

_player_facts: The fields the pipeline computes per player before evaluating scenarios. Segment `match` expressions and LLM message construction may only reference these. Keeping this list explicit is what makes the framework scalable — new conditions reuse these facts rather than inventing new plumbing.

player_facts.name: Player's first name (from registration profile).
player_facts.is_new: true if the player has zero finalized entries ever.
player_facts.words_total: Lifetime word count across finalized entries.
player_facts.days_since_last_entry: Whole days since their most recent finalized entry (null if none).
player_facts.last_entry_date: Local date (YYYY-MM-DD) of most recent finalized entry, or null.
player_facts.todays_prompt_id: ID of today's prompt, or null if no prompt scheduled today.
player_facts.started_today: true if a draft exists for today's prompt but is not finalized.
player_facts.submitted_today: true if today's prompt entry is finalized.
player_facts.missed_recent: true if there was a prompt in the last few days the player never submitted.
player_facts.last_ping_scenario: ID of the most recent scenario that messaged this player.
player_facts.last_ping_date: Local date of the most recent ping (for frequency caps).

_scenarios: Each scenario has a schedule (when the pipeline evaluates it), an optional precondition (a cheap gate that can skip the whole scenario), and an ordered list of segments. Segments are evaluated top-to-bottom; the FIRST whose `match` is true is the one used for that player. A segment with match "true" acts as a catch-all. `intent` and `tone` are the guidance handed to the LLM; `must_include` lists facts/content the message must contain.

scenarios.description: Daily send when a new prompt is live. Everyone registered gets the prompt; flavor depends on their recent activity.

segments.intent: Warmly welcome a first-timer and invite them into today's prompt with zero pressure.
Celebrate their streak by name and urge them to keep it alive with today's prompt.
Gently welcome them back after missed days — no guilt — and frame today as a fresh start.
Deliver today's prompt with a cheerful nudge to write.

scenarios.description: Same-day reminder on prompt days for players who haven't finished. Suppressed entirely for anyone who already submitted.

segments.intent: Remind them they have a draft going and just need to finish and post it before the day ends.
Light nudge that there's still time today to jump on the prompt before it closes.

scenarios.description: Periodic relationship-builder on a quiet (no-prompt) day. Reflects on how the player is doing overall and nudges or congratulates accordingly. Cadence-gated so each player hears from it at most once per window.

schedule._cadence: Pipeline only includes a player if it's been at least min_days since their last checkin-summary, and randomizes within the window so all players don't get it the same day.

segments.intent: Congratulate them on real progress, cite a concrete number (entries or words), and keep them feeling great about the habit.
Acknowledge they're keeping up, give a small high-five, and look ahead to the next prompt.
Friendly check-in for someone who's drifted — remind them their collection is waiting and the next prompt is a chance to jump back in.
Re-introduce the experience to someone who signed up but never wrote, and make the first entry feel easy and fun.
General friendly hello and encouragement to keep going.
